article_meta.title: EntrepreneursMeet Angelica Nwandu: Founder Of The Shade Room, Instagram's 3rd Most Engaged ProfileByTommy

reasoning: The summary remains neutral, avoids loaded language, and does not adopt any rhetorical framing from the source. It accurately paraphrases facts, includes key details proportionally, and attributes perspectives appropriately.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs and descriptors throughout; no interpretive phrasing.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims trace to article content (followers count, Sundance acceptance, team size).
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as fact; mild narrative phrasing is grounded in the article.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or emotional language; tone is measured.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not infer motives or internal states beyond reported facts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Single-profile piece summarized proportionally without favoring or downplaying elements.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes all major elements: background, career pivot, TSR founding, growth, team/community.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids value-laden adjectives; uses factual descriptors.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balanced portrayal consistent with source; no undue focus on negative or positive.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential treatment of elite or grassroots sources; reflects subject’s perspective and outlet.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source’s occasional laudatory phrasing; no inherited loaded framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Represents the outlet (Forbes) and the subject’s perspective; no other perspectives present in the article.
